title: senna durangensis var. durangensis
intro: Senna durangensis var. durangensis is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the Cassia or Senna plant. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a laxative and purgative, due to its high concentration of anthraquinone glycosides, which stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The health benefits of Senna durangensis var. durangensis include promoting digestive regularity, reducing inflammation, and supporting the body's natural detoxification processes. Senna durangensis var. durangensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various gastrointestinal disorders and promote overall well-being.
